summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that TT is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $449.99. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 53.8%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
